name: Mrs. D's Chocolate Caramels (Marcel Desaulniers)
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces unsweetened chocolate, chopped into 1/4-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the cream, sugar, corn syrup, and chopped chocolate in a 3-quart saucepan over medium heat.
2. When hot, stir to dissolve the sugar and chocolate. Bring mixture to a boil (about 20 minutes).
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer slowly for 40 minutes, stirring frequently until quite thick.
4. Remove from the heat, add vanilla extract, and stir to combine.
5. Add chopped walnuts and stir with a rubber spatula to combine.
6. Pour the mixture onto an aluminum foil-lined baking sheet, spreading it to the edges with a rubber spatula.
7. Allow the mixture to stand at room temperature for 15 minutes, then refrigerate for 2 hours before cutting.
8. Turn caramel out onto a cutting board. Use a serrated slicer to make 9 cuts across the width of the sheet at 1-1/2 inch intervals.
9. Make 4 cuts across the length of the sheet at 2-inch intervals.
10. Individually wrap each caramel in plastic wrap or aluminum foil, and store in the refrigerator until ready to devour.
